Added explicit interruption ("It is-" cut off by Ina), plus Ina's shift from tactical framing to sharper personal register ("I'm not doing blood math...") before she returns to operational asks.
finding_results.summary: Negotiation now carries visible leverage shifts, pressure cadence, and clearer idiolect separation instead of sequential approvals.
